title: hieracium laevigatum subsp. gothiciforme
intro: Hieracium laevigatum subsp. gothiciforme is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium laevigatum plant, commonly known as smooth hawk's-beard. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium laevigatum subsp. gothiciforme are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. In herbal preparations, Hieracium laevigatum subsp. gothiciforme is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
